book.title: Content OS
book.subtitle: The framework for turning content into a client pipeline that compounds.
book.description: A complete content operating system. Define your pillars, build a repeatable production engine, and turn every post into a step in your sales funnel.
whatYouLearn: The 4 content pillars that feed a pipeline
A production system that runs on schedule, not inspiration
Repurposing one idea into ten assets

faq.q: I am not a writer. Will this work?
faq.a: The system is built around frameworks and templates, not prose talent. AI handles first drafts; you refine.

sections.heading: A note before you begin
body: This is a preview of the opening of the book. The full version includes every chapter, every framework, and every template referenced inside.
Grab a notebook. The frameworks inside are meant to be used, not just read.
